untranslatable_reason: This signal requires identifying base formation geometry (width W in columns, reversal value R, and base lowest point) and applying a custom formula: Price_Objective = (W × R) + base_lowest_point. These are pattern-recognition parameters that cannot be expressed using the available indicators (which are price-based, moving averages, oscillators, and volatility measures). The signal fundamentally requires Point & Figure charting pattern recognition logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_5 is a Point & Figure charting pattern rule that calculates price targets based on base formation width and reversal box values. This requires visual pattern detection and geometric measurement capabilities beyond standard technical indicators. A backtest engine would need custom pattern-matching logic or manual base identification to implement this rule.
